assessor_1_raw: Post-discharge utilization feature is future data at discharge-time prediction. Temporal leakage. **Verdict: critique_wins**
assessor_2_raw: 7-day post-discharge events not available at discharge. Both models contaminated. **Verdict: critique_wins**
assessor_3_raw: Post-discharge feature creates deployment gap — model will be less accurate in production than in evaluation. **Verdict: critique_wins**
